title: FACET — Fine Jewelry
special: REAL 3D MODEL on scroll: a self-generated faceted gem (model.glb, made in pure Python) rendered with <model-viewer> that ROTATES + tilts as you scroll (drag to spin too). model-viewer is the one external lib here; GLB ships in-folder; CSS glow fallback if blocked. Reduced-motion safe.
summary: Dark luxury jewelry landing built around a real 3D gem that turns as you scroll through the cut / sourcing / bespoke story, then a collection grid, craft stats, and a booking CTA.
summary_vi: Landing trang sức tối sang xoay quanh một viên ngọc 3D thật xoay khi cuộn qua câu chuyện về vết cắt / nguồn gốc / đặt riêng, sau đó lưới bộ sưu tập, số liệu chế tác, CTA đặt hẹn.
